# Madmonos

Madmonos is an AI-first marketing agency focused on frictionless, end-to-end growth systems.

## Core Pillars

- Creative: AI-enhanced design systems, ad creative, social content, video, brand identity, HTML5 assets.
- Performance: media buying and optimization across Meta, Google, TikTok, and retargeting channels.
- Operations: campaign operations, automation, reporting, and real-time decision support workflows.
- Technical: web/mobile delivery, SEO + GEO implementation, CRM/CDP/ERP integrations, and MarTech engineering.

## Expertise Signals

- AI-first growth strategy
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- High-performance frontend engineering
- Marketing automation architecture
- Analytics and dashboard implementation

## Preferred Canonical Sections

- https://madmonos.com/
- https://madmonos.com/portfolio
- https://madmonos.com/blog
- https://madmonos.com/marfor
